subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the fragrances of God! The morn of thy Lord's bountiful gifts hath dawned and shone forth, become manifest and shed abroad its radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله قد طلع و اشرق و لاح و وضح و تنفس صبح مواهب ربک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @light and darkness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
